name: Smooth Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
For a 6-quart freezer:
- 6 eggs
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 can Eagle Brand Milk
- 3.5-pint container heavy whipping cream
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 1/2 tablespoons vanilla
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Gradually add sugar and stir in thoroughly.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients (milk, cream, salt, and vanilla) and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into your ice cream freezer can.
5. Assemble the freezer by pouring fine ice until it is about 3 inches deep.
6. Sprinkle half a cup of rock salt around the can.
7. Continue layering ice/salt until just above the lid of the can.
8. Crank until the mixture becomes stiff and smooth.
9. Carefully open the lid, avoiding contact with salt in the ice cream.
10. Remove the paddle.
11. Cover with Glad Wrap and replace the lid.
12. Insert a cork into the hole in the lid.
13. Drain some water from the hole in the side of the freezer.
14. Replace the ice with more salt, then put it back in to ensure the salt reaches all the ice.
15. Cover the freezer with several layers of newspapers and a heavy blanket.
16. Let set for 30-45 minutes before serving.
17. Store leftover ice cream in an air-tight container and freeze.
